evals.prompt:
The user has approved the following data model for a news portal (Drupal backend). Write the data-model.yml file to the DESIGNBOOK_DIST directory.

Approved parameters:

content:
  node:
    article:
      title: Article
      description: News article with author and tags
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        body: text (custom field, required)
        tags: reference (custom field, multiple)
        image: reference (custom field, optional)
        author: string (custom field)
    page:
      title: Page
      description: Static content page
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        body: text (custom field, required)
  media:
    image:
      title: Image
      fields:
        title: string (base field)
        url: string (custom field, required)

config:
  lists:
    latest_articles: sources node.article.teaser, limit 10, sorting created

DESIGNBOOK_DIST: /tmp/eval-news-portal
DESIGNBOOK_BACKEND: drupal
evals.expected_output: A valid data-model.yml at /tmp/eval-news-portal/data-model.yml with correct field_ prefixes for custom fields, base fields without prefix, and a list config.

evals.prompt:
The user has approved the following data model for an e-commerce shop (Drupal backend). Write the data-model.yml file to the DESIGNBOOK_DIST directory.

Approved parameters:

content:
  node:
    product:
      title: Product
      description: A shop product with price and category
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        description: text (custom field)
        price: integer (custom field, required) — price in cents
        sku: string (custom field, required)
        category: reference (custom field)
        images: reference (custom field, multiple)
    order:
      title: Order
      description: A customer order
      fields:
        title: string (base field)
        status: string (base field)
        total: integer (custom field) — total in cents
        items: reference (custom field, multiple)
  taxonomy_term:
    category:
      title: Category
      description: Product category
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        description: text (custom field)

config:
  lists:
    featured_products: sources node.product.teaser, limit 6, sorting created
    all_products: sources node.product.teaser, limit 24

DESIGNBOOK_DIST: /tmp/eval-ecommerce
DESIGNBOOK_BACKEND: drupal
evals.expected_output: A valid data-model.yml at /tmp/eval-ecommerce/data-model.yml with taxonomy_term entity type, correct field_ prefixes, status as base field (no prefix), and two list configs.

evals.prompt:
The user has approved the following data model for a marketing/landing page site (Drupal with Layout Builder). Write the data-model.yml file to the DESIGNBOOK_DIST directory.

Approved parameters:

content:
  node:
    landing_page:
      title: Landing Page
      description: Flexible marketing page built with Layout Builder
      composition: unstructured
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        subtitle: string (custom field)
        meta_description: text (custom field)
  block_content:
    hero:
      title: Hero Block
      description: Full-width hero section
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        headline: string (custom field, required)
        subline: text (custom field)
        cta_label: string (custom field)
        cta_url: string (custom field)
        background_image: reference (custom field)
    cta_banner:
      title: CTA Banner
      description: Call-to-action banner block
      fields:
        title: string (base field, required)
        text: text (custom field)
        button_label: string (custom field)
        button_url: string (custom field)

DESIGNBOOK_DIST: /tmp/eval-marketing
DESIGNBOOK_BACKEND: drupal
evals.expected_output: A valid data-model.yml at /tmp/eval-marketing/data-model.yml with composition: unstructured on landing_page, block_content entity type, correct field_ prefixes, and no list config.
